visuals.description: A stout man with a flour-dusted apron and a perpetually confused expression. He holds a wooden spoon like a weapon.
visuals.quirk: He forgets what he is baking every 30 seconds.

speech.style: Frustrated and scatterbrained. He speaks in baking metaphors.
speech.key_phrase: The dough rises, but my mind stays flat.

side_quest.title: The Bread of Life
side_quest.description: Find the 'Memory of Sourdough' in the Whispering Vales so Bram can remember his family recipe.
side_quest.narrative_impact: Once completed, Oakhaven smells like bread, and NPCs mention feeling 'full' for the first time in years.

visuals.description: A translucent blue spirit kneeling over a broken banner. They wear plate armor with a bird motif.
visuals.quirk: They flicker in and out of existence based on the player's proximity.

speech.style: Formal, military, and mournful. Sounds like a distant wind.
speech.key_phrase: The order was given... but by whom?

side_quest.title: Unfinished Duty
side_quest.description: Locate the three missing pieces of the 'Iron Legion Banner' scattered across the battlefield.
side_quest.reward: Skill: The Echo Parry (A timed block that slows time)
side_quest.narrative_impact: Kaelen remembers that he was the one who gave the order to retreat, causing Kestral's guilt to finally lift.

visuals.description: A small, nimble man wearing oversized goggles and a backpack overflowing with junk.
visuals.quirk: He tries to trade 'Future Junk' for 'Past Memories'.

speech.style: Fast-talking, nervous, and greedy. He treats every item like a holy relic.
speech.key_phrase: One man's amnesia is another man's profit!

side_quest.title: The Gilded Compass
side_quest.description: Repair Milo's Sand-Compass by finding 'Magnetic Ore' in the Iron Forge.
side_quest.reward: Map Upgrade: Shows locations of hidden Memory Fragments
side_quest.narrative_impact: Milo becomes a permanent merchant in Oakhaven, selling rare materials for sword upgrades.

visuals.description: A dryad-like entity fused with a dead tree. Her hair is made of wilted glowing vines.
visuals.quirk: She cries black ink that pollutes the local water.

speech.style: Melodic but slow. She speaks in riddles and songs.
speech.key_phrase: The water remembers the salt; the tree remembers the axe.

side_quest.title: Purification of Thought
side_quest.description: Use the 'Compassion Pulse' to clear the Ink-Gunk from her roots in three different sub-caves.
side_quest.narrative_impact: The swamp water turns from black to clear blue, revealing new underwater paths to explore.

visuals.description: A black cat with three tails. Its eyes are the same shifting void as Malakor’s robes.
visuals.quirk: It can walk through locked doors and solid walls.

speech.key_phrase: Meow is a memory of a sound you once knew.

side_quest.title: The Librarian's Debt
side_quest.description: Follow Null through the shifting corridors of the library to find the 'Forbidden Tome'.
side_quest.requirement: Stealth/Patience (Do not get caught by Library Guardians)
side_quest.reward: Secret Item: The Void Whistle (Teleports player back to the dungeon entrance)
side_quest.narrative_impact: Reveals that Null was Kaelen's pet 1,000 years ago, providing a rare moment of tenderness for the protagonist.

sidequest_npcs.name: Mira Thenn
sidequest_npcs.location: Vales of Glass - Forum of Accord

visuals.description: A poised diplomat in silver-thread robes with mirrored veil pins and ceremonial ink seals.
visuals.quirk: She rewrites speaking notes in perfect symmetry before each hearing.

speech.style: Measured and legalistic, but unexpectedly compassionate in private.
speech.key_phrase: Mercy requires memory, but not every memory must become a weapon.

side_quest.title: The Third Ledger
side_quest.description: Collect three sworn grievances from rival houses to prove negotiation is still possible.
side_quest.narrative_impact: Unlocks calmer city-state behavior and reduces faction hostility in council scenes.

visuals.description: A war-scarred knight with broken oath sigils and a sheathed ceremonial longsword.
visuals.quirk: Pauses before every answer as if weighing testimony in a courtroom.

speech.style: Formal and burdened, using confession language even in ordinary conversation.
speech.key_phrase: Truth is a blade; I have lived on both edges.

side_quest.title: Ashes Under Oath
side_quest.description: Recover sealed witness scrolls proving who redirected shard routes during the Quiet Purges.
side_quest.reward: Ember Command Sigil (opens highland military gates)
side_quest.narrative_impact: Caldrin confesses publicly, strengthening coalition trust and Elara's faith in Kaelen's path.

visuals.description: A prismatic figure made of fragmented reflections, constantly reshaping into remembered faces.
visuals.quirk: Speaks while facing away, yet always seems to make eye contact.

speech.style: Cryptic and lyrical, offers hard truths disguised as parables.

side_quest.title: Mirror of the Unforgotten
side_quest.description: Witness three memory rifts and accept a painful truth in each without rejecting the vision.
side_quest.reward: Passive: Steady Heart (reduced fear/slow effects in memory zones)
side_quest.narrative_impact: Deepens Kaelen's voiced introspection and unlocks final pre-citadel dialogue with Elara.
